title: Khirbet al-Ra'i in the Judean Shephelah — proposed identification with Ziklag (excavation publications and announcements, 2019–)
author: Yosef Garfinkel; Saar Ganor; et al.
publisher: Hebrew University of Jerusalem / Israel Antiquities Authority
allowedUseNotes: Copyrighted publications. Summaries in project's own words only.
summary: Excavations at Khirbet al-Ra'i near Lachish revealed Philistine-affiliated material followed by early 10th-century occupation, on which basis the excavators proposed the site as Ziklag. The identification has been publicly contested by other scholars and is treated here as one candidate among three.
confidenceNotes: TO VERIFY (M1): precise peer-reviewed citation(s), and named critics with their published rebuttals. Until verified, the UI hedges proponents/critics accordingly.
